one_line_ask: Turn the client's product hero shot, stock backdrop, brand palette, and two authored source templates into a cohesive modern-storefront graphics package: a desktop + mobile hero banner, clean PDP image frames and vector icon/divider assets, and tied-together decoration — delivered as layered source exports plus optimized JPG/PNG.
brief: I'm refreshing my online shop and need a cohesive set of graphics that instantly tells shoppers they're in a sleek, modern space. Scope is three areas. (1) STORE BANNER — a hero that sets the tone the moment visitors land, sized for both desktop (1920x720) and mobile (1080x1350). I'll give you one clean product hero shot to build it from. (2) PDP ASSETS — template-ready image frames plus iconography and typography treatments that make features, specs and CTAs pop without clutter. (3) STORE DECORATION — background elements, section dividers and accent graphics that tie everything together page to page. Art direction: clean lines, bold but balanced color, plenty of negative space — nothing fussy or ornamental. I'm supplying brand colors (deep ink #14233B + warm sand #E7D3B1 accent), the product hero shot, a few supporting product crops, and two layered source templates my team authored in InDesign and Illustrator (the banner layout .indd with our logo + headline frames, and an .ai sheet of our icon/divider library) so you can produce the final layered source files and labeled exports we can tweak later. Please also pull one modern, negative-space lifestyle backdrop from stock for the
